subject: Short of our Goal

body:

Friend, I'm going to get straight to the point.

My pre-primary, FEC mandated financial report is in less than 24 hours...

**... and I'm very concerned.**

My finance director just shared with me our projection report - and I'm in danger of falling behind. Here are the numbers:

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36928202:sM3DkRYN-:m:1:1328517760:C6E7461005FA82BA14C29DDF8304E83A:r)
Friend, I know you have been with me in the past and I'm so grateful for your support.

**But now, with less than 24 hours remaining before my pre-primary filing deadline, I'm in danger of coming up short. And Friend, I can't afford to miss it.**

That's why I'm turning to you. [**Will you use one of the secure, instant donate buttons below to make an immediate, pre-primary donation of $1,000, $250, $100, $50, or $25 in the next 24 hours?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36928202:sM3DkRYN-:m:1:1328517760:C6E7461005FA82BA14C29DDF8304E83A:r)

That's why I'm personally asking you - one of my most loyal supporters - [**to chip in at least $25 or $50 right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36928202:sM3DkRYN-:m:1:1328517760:C6E7461005FA82BA14C29DDF8304E83A:r)

Friend, I'm so thankful for your support as I launched my Senate race just weeks ago, but I also must ask one more time: [**can I count on you to help me right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36928202:sM3DkRYN-:m:1:1328517760:C6E7461005FA82BA14C29DDF8304E83A:r)

I cannot overstate the importance of this deadline and I only have 24 hours!

Marco Rubio

Team Trump

subject: Missouri NEA Endorses Koster for Missouri

body:

Hi,
I'm excited to report that the Missouri National Education Association (MNEA) announced their endorsement of Chris Koster today. The Missouri NEA represents more than 35,000 public school teachers, librarians, counselors, coaches, and school psychologists around the state.

While the current General Assembly continues to let our students down by failing to fully fund the foundation formula, educators across the state know that as Governor, Chris Koster will make upgrading our public education system a top priority.

[**Hear first-hand from MNEA members about why it is critical for Missouri to elect Chris in November:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5557474486523398144/-429108001613936640?utm_campaign=fnd_mnea_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160810_fnd_gq_mnea_ful__aw)

As we travel around the state, I am amazed at how many people -- of all political backgrounds and leanings -- are disgusted with the way legislators in Jefferson City play politics with school funding. Chris knows that if we want to succeed in the 21st Century economy, we must invest in our children now.

[**Watch the video now to learn more about Chris ' commitment to public education and why 35,000 educators from across the state have decided to join Team Koster. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/5557474486523398144/-429108001613936640?utm_campaign=fnd_mnea_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160810_fnd_gq_mnea_ful__aw)

Thank you,

Andrew Whalen

body:

There are now only 90 days left until Election Day. **[The time to step up is _now_. Make your first contribution of $5 to support Russ's campaign today to make sure we have the resources we need to take on Senator Ron Johnson and the Koch network.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4434/1c469400/7f90e19/35724a5/46683731/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nom?utm_source=ema_2016-08-10_rdf-nom_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-10_rdf-nom_nd&utm_campaign=rdf-nom&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4434/1c469400/7f90e19/35724a2/46683731/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nom?utm_source=ema_2016-08-10_rdf-nom_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-10_rdf-nom_nd&utm_campaign=rdf-nom&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
We can't afford to lose our momentum: Just last week, the Koch network hit the airwaves with another $1 million in misleading ads attacking Russ. They're not going to give up their "model legislator" without a fight, and there's nothing stopping them from tapping into their network of right-wing donors for another seven million dollars in dark money to try and erase all of our hard work.
**Here's the truth: We will never outspend them._So, we're going to outwork them._**

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Choosing country over party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Did you see my op-ed in the Salt Lake Tribune yesterday?
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6084838087463209728/-7377230447911957760?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Dear Peter, Did you see my op-ed in the Salt Lake Tribune yesterday? I wrote it because it's time for Utah GOP leaders to show some real leadership and denounce Donald Trump. I know you're probably sick of hearing about Donald Trump. I am too. I don't much care anymore what he says or does because it's all absurd, and there's no doubt left that he's unfit for office. Mostly, I've chosen to not bring up Trump or his antics on my campaign. But last week was a new low, with his disgusting attacks against the Gold Star parents of fallen hero Captain Humayun Khan. As a proud husband and father, it both breaks my heart and infuriates me to see grieving parents mistreated this way--especially considering that their son died serving our country. I couldn't stay silent. I wrote this op-ed because it's time for Utah GOP leaders to stop being silent. If they won't denounce that ridiculous bully, then it's time for them to go. **[Chip in $20 to send a message: the Party of Trump is not the party for Utah.](https://act.myngp.com/el/6084838087463209728/-7377230447911957760?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** The short story is this: our governor knows that Trump is making a mockery of our Utah values but says nothing. He pretends that a vice presidential pick is enough to make up for Trump's attacks against women, veterans, and religious freedom. Gary Herbert is acting cowardly even though more than two-thirds of Utahns have a low opinion of Trump and say they won't vote for him. That's not representation, and definitely not what we need in a governor. It's time for Gov. Herbert and other Utah elected officials to choose country over party. **[Contribute today to change direction in Utah and kick Herbert out!](https://act.myngp.com/el/6084838087463209728/-7377230447911957760?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---

Friend -- Did you see Evan's email from Friday? **He asked for your help.**
* Political experts are calling our Senate race a "toss-up"
* So the Kochs and national Republicans have jumped in with attack ads
* **But _your_ grassroots support will help us fight back.**

**[Will you answer Evan's call and pitch in $5 now to turn our "toss-up" into a WIN?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5043f/7be36b49/1ed8f5b2/78f8d010/2543299646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=201608010&amount=10")** \-- Team Bayh

\----ORIGINAL MESSAGE----
_From: Evan Bayh_
_Subject: I'll be direct:_

Friend,

I appreciate everything you've done to support my campaign for Senate.

I'm emailing you because it's a critical time for our race. The Koch brothers have just dropped six figures on ads attacking me.

I can take the attacks -- but I hate to see them misleading the people of Indiana.

I'll be direct: **[I'm asking you for to help our campaign fight back and tell the truth.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5043f/7be36b49/1ed8f5b2/78f8d010/2543299646/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=201608010&amount=10")** And here's the truth: I've always been one to put our state's best interests above partisan bickering and special interests. And I'll fight my heart out for the people of Indiana.

**Friend, top prognosticators are calling our race a toss-up.** That means this Koch deluge could easily tilt the scales. We need to build a strong grassroots movement to be able to take them on.

**And that starts with you.[Will you pitch in $5 to help me bring Hoosier values to the Senate?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5043f/7be36b49/1ed8f5b2/78f8d010/2543299646/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=201608010&amount=10")**

Best,

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Hillary needs us now, Peter
body:
We can't live in fear | Peter --

Earlier this year, Madeleine Albright led a global call for the UN to take action to prevent violence against women in politics. She noted a female opposition party official in Uganda who was forced by the police to strip naked in public during a protest, as well as a councilwoman in Bolivia who was strangled to death after she helped her female colleagues file complaints against harassment.

“Clearly, these are not isolated incidents...an alarming but uncounted number of women are specifically targeted because they are engaged in public life,” Albright wrote.

Here in the United States, we’ve seen escalating threats against Hillary throughout this campaign, from chants of “lock her up” at the Republican convention to one of Trump’s advisors suggesting Hillary be executed by a firing squad.

Yesterday, Donald Trump said that if his supporters don’t like Hillary’s judicial appointments, the “Second Amendment people” can do something about it.

This is absolutely beyond the pale -- there’s no excuse whatsoever for behavior like this from anyone, let alone a presidential candidate who may soon command the combined strength of the United States military.

Hillary has spent her entire career fighting for women, families, and anyone who needed her. Right now, she needs her team to stand up and fight for her. **Let’s show her that we’re here by her side, that we will not accept Trump’s rhetoric, and that we’re going to keep fighting for a nation and a world where all women can make their voices heard without fear:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyMDU4MTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxODA3NTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Mini

Mini Timmaraju
Director of Women's Outreach
Hillary for America

|

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyMDU4MTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxODA3NTgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

And Marco Rubio, with the support of the GOP establishment and a flood of dark money behind him, could win. So, everyone, I need your help. We have a huge goal of $75,000 to raise by TONIGHT and it's absolutely imperative that we meet it -- but right now we're behind. "" If we let Rubio win, we'll risk losing so much of the progress we've made. If we let the GOP keep control of the Senate, they'll jeopardize the rights of women, immigrants, and the LGBT community -- Americans just like you and me. We absolutely can 't let that happen. We can't miss this goal -- not with so much at stake. Can you chip in $5? Your gift will be matched. body:
I just got off the phone with Brian, my Finance Director, and we’re only a couple hundred away from beating our $10,000 goal.
---
| **Friend, I just got off the phone with Brian, my Finance Director, and we’re only a couple hundred away from beating our $10,000 goal.**

**With only 90 days separating us from Election Day** , I can’t tell you how important it is that we hit this goal.

[**We’re up against the clock. Can I count on you to help us out?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/8d2226c8c7854a22a78924ce34143762?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_header_cta&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct)

Thank you,
Eric

Sent from my iPad

On Wed, Aug 10, 2016 at 9:20 AM, Mike O’Brien <[communications@holcombforindiana.com](http://links.iterable.com/u/18a220b5140f45c78d543a720084db2c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_header_email&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct)> sent: |
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/857571fab0d64391ad6ca006ded8fa2b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct) |
| Friend,

**Our volunteers are going to be critical in this election.**

Whether it’s knocking on doors, talking with friends and neighbors, or spreading our conservative message, our volunteers could make or break this campaign.

**Today marks 90 days until Election Day. That means we need to act now to build the campaign infrastructure necessary to win in November.** So while our volunteers are going to be investing their time and energy to win, we need your investment today in order to build our grassroots army.

[**Donate $25 to contribute 10 cases of water for our field organizers**](http://links.iterable.com/u/60b73b7d193841938ac4934917d0cbb9?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&amount=25&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct)
[**Donate $50 to contribute 100 new bumper stickers to distribute**](http://links.iterable.com/u/245c4f6c2d004afc9867ef413c7331d1?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&amount=50&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct)
[**Donate $105 to contribute all brand new phones for a phone bank**](http://links.iterable.com/u/59f9254ee9594427b266702ed84802c6?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&amount=105&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_3&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct)

**We’ve set a goal to raise $10,000 by the end of the day.** This is your best chance to have a direct impact on the campaign. Each dollar you donate goes directly into our field effort.

[**Help us beat our $10,000 goal and kick this campaign off right!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/7cfcf7bfa2f7473886c6943f46efb41c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct)

Thank you,
Mike O’Brien
Team Holcomb Campaign Manager |
| [Contribute](http://links.iterable.com/u/31f6e4ba4fc242d282221d6847898a02?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=69137b3c374544369ee1534669ad43a4&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=button_footer_text&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160810-fwd-what-we-need-today-16266-direct) |

| Greetings,
---
| Thank you for all of your support. With your help Phil won the Republican nomination to be Vermont's next governor. Countless supporters volunteered their time and resources marching in parades, joining Phil at events, and spreading Phil’s message and priorities. Your support is the reason Phil was successful in the primary and on behalf of the whole team, THANK YOU.

Phil is more resolved than ever to lead this state and to focus all of our attention on growing the economy and addressing the fiscal issues that are making Vermont unaffordable for working families. Today, Phil and Team Scott are refocusing our efforts on the general election and we look forward to working with you for the next three months to elect Phil Scott the next governor of Vermont.

\-- Team Scott
